name: tradingagents
description: Substanz Edition v2 — 4 analysts + 13 famous-investor personas (Buffett/Burry/Wood/…) + bull/bear debate + trader + risk manager + DCF/Kelly/ATR/Sharpe quant tools + backtester + read-only Next.js dashboard. Multi-mode (quick/standard/deep), multi-style (value/growth/macro/contrarian/council). v2 ships TOON-encoded MCP tabular outputs (history/technical) and a single-call signal-aggregator for the trader, cutting per-run tokens ~10% on /deep.

fds_api_token.title: Financial Datasets API key (optional)
fds_api_token.description: Optional — premium fundamentals via https://financialdatasets.ai. Leave empty to use only Alpha Vantage + yfinance.
